title: Cleaning the beach
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Sunday, I joined a group of volunteers who were cleaning a beach near my town. We met early in the morning, when there were not many people (27) the beach. The organiser gave everyone gloves and bags, then explained what kind of rubbish we should collect. I was shocked (28) the amount of plastic we found in just one hour. Some pieces had probably been left by visitors, while others had been carried there (29) the sea. Although the work was tiring, it felt good to do something useful for the environment. A local newspaper photographer came to take pictures, and later our group appeared (30) a local news website. The organiser thanked us (31) helping and said the beach looked much cleaner than before. I hope more people will think carefully before throwing rubbish away (32) future.
